name: Neon Blaze
desc: Bold red/pink/blue per-player Player Info, Neon Blue background, board spins on triples/doubles/tons.

name: Neon Green
desc: Full Player Info sizing (same layout as Neon Blaze) in a green/teal/lime palette, dark-tinted cards, green triple/double glow. Each player gets a slightly different green shade.

name: Native
desc: Resets the target preset to plain default Autodarts look (no overrides).
